## CheatReader v0.1.22

### Highlights
- Added a reading layout option to disable punctuation-preferred wrapping, so each visual line can fill the available reader width before wrapping.
- Added a Hide Taskbar Icon setting for desktop builds, using the platform taskbar/Dock visibility support exposed by `window_manager`.

### Notes
- The punctuation wrapping preference is enabled by default to keep existing layouts unchanged; turn it off in Reading Settings for denser line packing.
- The taskbar icon setting is saved and applied during startup so the app does not briefly appear in the taskbar before being hidden.
- `--reset-display` and `--safe-mode` now restore the taskbar icon as part of display recovery, making it easier to find the reader after an aggressive hiding setup.
- Settings persistence and startup recovery now include the new wrapping and taskbar visibility preferences.
